Implants.description: Implants from Five Parsecs From Home Core Rules (p.55). A character may have up to 2 implants. Once applied, they cannot be damaged or removed. Bots and Soulless cannot use implants.
restrictions: Once applied, cannot be damaged or removed

types.name: AI Companion
types.description: When making Savvy rolls, the character may roll twice and pick the better score.
types.special_ability: Roll twice on Savvy checks, pick better result

types.name: Boosted Arm
types.description: Increase Grenade range by +2". If the character ends their Move in contact with an obstacle that is no taller than the miniature, they may pull themselves up on top (but not cross) as a Free Action.
types.special_ability: Grenade range +2", climb low obstacles as Free Action

types.name: Boosted Leg
types.description: Increase base move and Dash speed by +1" each.

types.name: Cyber Hand
types.description: The character may take any one Pistol they own and build it into their hand. Range is reduced to half, but the weapon always shoots with +1 to Hit and an additional +1 bonus when Brawling.

types.name: Genetic Defenses
types.description: 5+ Saving Throw, if subjected to any poison, virus, gas, or disease.

types.name: Health Boost
types.description: If a post-battle Injury would result in 2+ campaign turns of recovery time, reduce the time by 1. If the character has Toughness 3 when receiving this implant, raise it to 4.
types.special_ability: Reduce recovery time by 1 turn (if 2+). Toughness 3 becomes 4 on install.

types.name: Nerve Adjuster
types.description: Whenever the character is Stunned for any reason, they receive a 5+ Saving Throw to avoid the Stun.

types.name: Night Sight
types.description: The character does not suffer visibility reductions due to darkness, but is affected by smoke, gas, etc. normally.

types.name: Pain Suppressor
types.description: The character can perform crew tasks while in Sick Bay, though they cannot participate in battles.
types.special_ability: Crew tasks available while in Sick Bay

implant_rules.species_restrictions: Bots and Soulless cannot use implants
